history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with dark, tousled hair is leaning against a wall. He is wearing a dark navy crewneck sweatshirt and dark wash, wide-leg jeans. His left leg is bent and resting on a low surface, while his right leg is extended downwards. He is looking down, his head bowed, giving a contemplative or perhaps shy expression.

The background features a textured wall covered in small, square mosaic tiles. These tiles are predominantly shades of brown and gold, with a shimmering, metallic quality that catches the light. The mosaic wall is framed by a dark brown wooden border. To the right of the mosaic wall, the adjacent wall is a neutral, light beige color with a subtle textured pattern, possibly wallpaper or painted plaster.

The lighting appears to be artificial and somewhat dim, creating soft shadows and highlighting the reflective surfaces of the mosaic tiles. The overall color palette is warm and earthy, dominated by browns, golds, and the deep blue of the man's clothing, contrasted with the neutral beige wall. The mood is intimate and slightly moody, with the man's posture and downward gaze suggesting introspection. The style is contemporary and casual.
